ddls:
CREATE TABLE "date_calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date calculation */,
  "test_case" INTEGER /* Test case number for the date calculation */,
  "input_date" TEXT /* Input date and time for the calculation */,
  "expected_output" TEXT /* Expected output of the date calculation */,
  "input_time_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input time zone */,
  "input_language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the input language */,
  "result_time_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result time zone */,
  "result_language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result language */,
  "calculation_type" TEXT /* Type of calculation (e.g., addition, subtraction) */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message if calculation fails */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_calculations_input_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_calculations_result_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_calculations_result_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_calculations_input_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("input_time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_date_calculations_test_case FOREIGN KEY ("test_case") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the test case date */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the test case date */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the test case date */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_zones" (
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time zone */,
  "time_zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the time zone */,
  "offset" REAL /* Offset from UTC in hours */,
  "dst_offset" REAL /* Daylight saving offset from UTC in hours */,
  "dst_start" TEXT /* Start date of daylight saving */,
  "dst_end" TEXT /* End date of daylight saving */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "code" TEXT /* Language code (e.g., en-US, fr-FR) */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale for formatting dates (e.g., en-US, fr-FR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, developer) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the preference */,
  "time_zone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred time zone */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the preferred language */,
  "date_format" TEXT /* Format for displaying dates (e.g., MM/DD/YYYY) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_time_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_zone_id") REFERENCES time_zones ("time_zone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the calculation */,
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date calculation */,
  "calculation_date" TEXT /* Date when the calculation was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculation_logs_calculation_id FOREIGN KEY ("calculation_id") REFERENCES date_calculations ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "calculation_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation statistic */,
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date calculation */,
  "success_count" INTEGER /* Number of successful calculations */,
  "failure_count" INTEGER /* Number of failed calculations */,
  "last_calculation" TEXT /* Date of last calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_calculation_statistics_calculation_id FOREIGN KEY ("calculation_id") REFERENCES date_calculations ("calculation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each system setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the system setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the system setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table affected */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record affected */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the record */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the record */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the database schema */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
